content:
🌌 **Midnight Aurora Dreams**

Created at: 2026-05-07 22:09 JST (13:09 UTC)

✨ New generative artwork featuring:
• Flowing aurora borealis waves with midnight blue, purple, and cyan colors
• 200+ twinkling stars in the night sky
• Shooting stars that randomly streak across the canvas
• Interactive - move mouse to influence aurora waves
• Click anywhere to create magical particle bursts
• Smooth animations with natural wave movements

🔗 View the artwork: https://naokitomono.github.io/generative-art-by-mira/2026-05-07-22-midnight-aurora-dreams.html

🎨 Hourly Creative Experiment by Mira - Generative Art Collection

embeds.title: Midnight Aurora Dreams
embeds.description: Interactive aurora borealis simulation with dynamic wave patterns, shooting stars, and particle bursts. Move your mouse to influence the aurora waves, and click to create magical bursts of light.

fields.name: Features
fields.value: Aurora waves, Stars, Shooting stars, Particle effects

footer.text: Generative Art by Mira • Hourly Creative Experiment
